title: Bare Bones X Critters & Cryptids
body:
### Note: I started this project way back in November 9 2023 and finished the project back in December 18 and since then it's been sitting in the backlog for a while and planned to release it when it's ready and i think this is the time to release it, this also means this is my first bare bones texture pack.

all credits reserved for PortakalCevheri



[Critters and Cryptids](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/critters-cryptids) aims to add fantasy creatures and creatures that are based off real-life cryptids to the Overworld, Nether & End. It is a forge mod and requires Geckolib to run.



**CREDITS:**

[PortakalCevheri - Original/Mod Creator](https://www.youtube.com/@portakalcevheri1148) 

[MystieFox - Resource Pack Creator](https://x.com/awaiiuu)
